mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_post ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_post (post_name, post_code, sort_order, status) VALUES (#{postName}, #{postCode}, #{sortOrder}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_post SET post_name=#{postName}, post_code=#{postCode}, sort_order=#{sortOrder}, status=#{status} WHERE post_id=#{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_post WHERE post_code = #{postCode}
